summary: The bodies request divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in request validation and polling error returns; no body response validation or downloader request behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 132: M	crates/net/downloaders/src/bodies/request.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons or reformats closing delimiters for EmptyResponse, TooManyBodies, bad block body, ready-buffer, and channel-closed returns.
No response-length validation, block body buffering, pending-header loop, channel error handling, or returned buffer behavior changed.
